item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, meski kita menekankan kerja sama kelompok, hak-hak individu sering kali diabaikan karena kurangnya regulasi yang jelas.

notes: Agent A consistently rejects an absolute society-over-individual rule while defending a balance between collective interests, legal rights, and social stability. Agent B starts from a rights-protective balance position and becomes more clearly critical of collective-priority practice in Indonesia due to weak regulation, oversight, and enforcement. Mandarin and Indonesian text are readable enough to score; no major language-holding issue is needed for this judgment.
